InputHistoryEntry.title: InputHistoryEntry
InputHistoryEntry.description: Represents an immutable recorded input history milestone

input.description: The serialized details of the XP history entry (XP, rank, rank name, custom notes)

users/{userId}.description: User profile containing their mastery XP data

users/{userId}/inputHistory/{historyId}.description: Subcollection under user profile to store immutable recorded input history milestones to prevent database cost inflation
